dict.string: File position of the stream might be 'indeterminate' after a failed operation. Can cause undefined behavior
Assuming 'nbuf' is not equal to NULL
Assuming 'ptr' is not equal to NULL

Read function called when stream is in EOF state. Function has no effect

Assuming 'ptr' is not equal to NULL

Use of memory after it is freed

Assuming field 'h_next' is equal to history_def_next
